title: HOMESmith Large Heavy Duty Rubble Blue Sacks Builders and DIY Choice Rubble Bags - Pack of 5 HS-132
features: EXTRA STRONG RUBBLE BAGS - The heavy duty bags are extra reliable and extremely strong, capable of filling up the heaviest load of rubble waste. These no-nonsense bags are not your standard refuse bags, they can hold over 30 kilograms capacity in weight, so you can make good use of their incredible packing space

LEAKPROOF AND EFFICIENT - The rubble bags are made from waterproof and durable plastic which is also made from recyclable material. Have peace of mind when removing unwanted waste, as there will no longer be unwanted messy leakages or a dirty house when moving rubbish from your garden to the driveway

MULTIPURPOSE SACKS - These versatile sacks are ideal for a multitude of DIY projects from gardening to house cleaning. Use them to easily store soil, rubbish, rubble, grass, sand, stones or other heavy materials. You can also use them for compost, storage, gravel, plants, leaves or logs

IDEAL SIZE - These handy refuse bags are perfectly sized measuring 50cm x 70cm (20" x 28”) with a flat top and 100cm rim opening. If you want to close the bag, a recommended purchase of an anti-tamper seal string is ideal

STERLING STANDARD - We set the sterling standard for supplying the UK with only the best quality, most affordable products to fill that gap in your life. From Home Products to Souvenirs & Gifts, Tech & Gadgets, and Clothing, everything comes with our quality promise
